diagrams.title: Proof of Work Consensus Process
diagrams.description: Shows how miners compete to solve cryptographic puzzles and add blocks to the blockchain
diagrams.purpose: Understanding PoW mining process and how consensus is achieved through computational work

diagrams.title: PBFT Consensus Phases
diagrams.description: Illustrates the three-phase protocol used in Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how PBFT achieves Byzantine fault tolerance through message passing between nodes

diagrams.title: Blockchain Fork Resolution
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how the longest chain rule resolves competing blockchain forks
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how nodes reach consensus on the correct chain when multiple valid chains exist

diagrams.title: Consensus Properties Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between Safety, Liveness, and Fault Tolerance in distributed consensus
diagrams.purpose: Understanding trade-offs and the fundamental challenges in achieving perfect consensus
